name: Ely Gold Royalties Inc.
summary: Ely Gold Royalties Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration, development, evaluation of natural resource projects in North America. It primarily explores for gold and precious metal deposits. The company has a portfolio of 12 key assets, 27 development assets, 43 exploration assets consisting of 38 deeded royalties, and 14 leased properties. It owns interests in approximately 70 properties. The company was formerly known as Ely Gold & Minerals Inc. and changed its name to Ely Gold Royalties Inc. in November 2017. Ely Gold Royalties Inc. was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
